prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次10605、2026年计划小幅缩招（-4.2%）使位次理论上移约265名、本省物理类考生微增及 学校声誉热度平稳等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年略有前移，预测最低位次约10310名，区间9810–10810名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 8683 → 8752 → 8716 → 11550 → 10605. From 2021 to 2023, it stabilized around 8700. In 2024, due to the new Gaokao subject grouping (unrestricted group), the ranking shifted to 11550, and in 2025 it rebounded to 10605. The fluctuation range in the past two years is about 1000 places, with a baseline of approximately 10605 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Jiangxi Province for Physics Category (Science) was 41 in 2021, 41 in 2022, 43 in 2023, 40 in 2024, and 48 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 46, a decrease of 2 from 2025, a slight reduction of about 4.2%, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 59th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 47–59 range in recent years, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving campus management incidents such as dormitory security checks, with no major negative public opinion. It ranks 41st in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure, maintaining stable application attention. No abnormal historical admission records have been observed for Jinan University, with no signs of enrollment gaps. Journalism and Communication is rated A, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A-, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Biology A-, Pharmacy A-. Among these, Journalism and Communication and Business Administration are A-level, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, while Clinical Medicine and Stomatology maintain stable popularity, matching the university's Physics Category enrollment majors (Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science, Clinical Medicine, etc.). The estimated number of Physics Category examinees in Jiangxi Province in 2026 is about 268,000, a slight increase of about 0.5% from 266,000 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition. Jinan University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, a first-tier city, which has a strong regional appeal to Jiangxi examinees. The university's enrollment share in Jiangxi Province is about 3.3% (2025 data), a moderate out-of-province enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 10605, the slight enrollment reduction in 2026 (-4.2%) theoretically moving the ranking up by about 265 places, the slight increase in local Physics Category examinees, and the stable university reputation and popularity, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 10310, with a range of 9810–10810.

Candidates with rankings in the upper-middle segment of the range (around 10000 or better) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Stomatology and Clinical Medicine. Candidates with rankings in the middle segment (around 10300) are advised to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors such as Computer Science, Accounting, and Optoelectronic Information. Candidates with rankings in the lower segment (around 10600 or beyond) can consider Tier 3 majors as safety options, while also paying attention to new engineering majors added to the enrollment plan, such as Intelligent Materials Technology and New Energy Science and Engineering.
